entity.summary: Decentralized cross-chain liquidity aggregation and swap protocol that routes on-chain and cross-chain trades across multiple blockchain networks and liquidity sources.
entity.notes: Current first-party site and documentation expose active on-chain and cross-chain swap routing. DefiLlama identifies the current service as Fly, previously Magpie Protocol, and reports substantial non-zero DEX aggregator volume. No exact rebrand date, launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Fly official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes fly.trade as an execution and infrastructure layer for DEXs and chains that aggregates liquidity for on-chain and cross-chain swaps.

evidence.title: fly.trade DEX aggregator metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, 30-day, and cumulative DEX aggregator volume and identify Fly as the current continuation of Magpie Protocol.
